title: Wave-Optics Imprints of Dark Matter Subhalos on Strongly Lensed Gravitational Waves
summary: Wave-optics effects in strongly lensed gravitational waves (GWs) provide a new interferometric probe of dark matter substructure. We compute the full diffraction integral for GWs propagating through statistically generated cold dark matter subhalo populations and quantify the resulting frequency-dependent amplification in the Laser Interferometer Space Antenna (LISA) band. We show that realistic galaxy-scale lenses generically produce percent-level amplitude and phase distortions in strongly magnified images, primarily induced by subhalos in the mass range $10^4$-$10^7\,M_{\odot}$. These signatures arise naturally within the standard cold dark matter paradigm and should be detectable in high signal-to-noise LISA events. Strongly lensed GWs thus offer a direct and complementary window on dark matter structure at subgalactic mass scales inaccessible to electromagnetic measurements.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强透镜引力波中的波动光学效应为暗物质亚结构提供了一种新的干涉探针。我们计算了引力波在统计生成的冷暗物质子晕种群中传播时的完整衍射积分，并量化了在激光干涉空间天线（LISA）频段内产生的频率相关放大效应。我们表明，真实的星系尺度透镜通常会在强放大像中产生百分之一水平的振幅和相位畸变，这主要由质量范围在 $10^4$-$10^7\,M_{\odot}$ 的子晕引起。这些特征在标准冷暗物质范式中自然出现，并且应在高信噪比的LISA事件中可探测。因此，强透镜引力波为电磁测量无法达到的亚星系质量尺度的暗物质结构提供了一个直接且互补的窗口。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，强透镜引力波为亚星系质量尺度的暗物质结构提供了直接且互补的探测窗口，这是电磁测量无法达到的尺度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spatial distribution of dark-matter subhalos in a representative realization of the strongly lensed system. The red cross (triangle) marks the macro minimum (saddle) image. Colored points in the main panel denote 26 low-mass subhalos ( \(10^{4}\) – \(10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) ) included explicitly in the WO calculation, while the inset shows 13 massive subhalos ( \(m_{sub}>10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) ) treated in the GO limit. For visual clarity, subhalos in the mass range \(10^{2}\) – \(10^{4}\,M_{\odot}\) (1218 objects in this realization) are not displayed, although they are included in the WO calculation. The color scale indicates \(\log_{10}(m_{sub}/M_{\odot})\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：强透镜系统代表性实现中暗物质子晕的空间分布。红色十字（三角形）标记宏观最小（鞍点）像。主面板中的彩色点表示波动光学计算中明确包含的26个低质量子晕（ \(10^{4}\) – \(10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) ），而插图中显示了在几何光学极限下处理的13个大质量子晕（ \(m_{sub}>10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) ）。为清晰起见，质量范围在 \(10^{2}\) – \(10^{4}\,M_{\odot}\) 的子晕（此实现中有1218个对象）未显示，但它们已包含在波动光学计算中。色标表示 \(\log_{10}(m_{sub}/M_{\odot})\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Frequency-dependent gravitational-wave amplification factor in the fiducial strongly lensed configuration. Top: absolute amplification \(|F(f)|\) . Middle: relative amplitude modulation \(|F(f)/F(0.1\,{Hz})|-1\) . Bottom: phase shift \(\arg F(f)\) . Shaded bands indicate the 68% and 95% ranges over 200 independent subhalo realizations, and the black curve shows the median. Thin red curves illustrate three representative realizations.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在基准强透镜配置中频率相关的引力波放大因子。顶部：绝对放大 \(|F(f)|\) 。中部：相对振幅调制 \(|F(f)/F(0.1\,{Hz})|-1\) 。底部：相位偏移 \(\arg F(f)\) 。阴影带表示200个独立子晕实现中的68%和95%范围，黑色曲线显示中位数。细红色曲线展示了三个代表实现。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Dependence of the GW amplification factor \(|F(f)|\) on the minimum subhalo mass included in the WO calculation. From top to bottom panels, three realizations (the same as in Fig. 2 ) are shown. Different line styles correspond to different minimum subhalo masses \(m_{sub,min}=10^{2}\) – \(10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：引力波放大因子 \(|F(f)|\) 对波动光学计算中包含的最小子晕质量的依赖性。从上到下面板，显示了三个实现（与图2相同）。不同线型对应不同的最小子晕质量 \(m_{sub,min}=10^{2}\) – \(10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Distribution of the dimensionless Fermat potential \(I(\tau)\) for three representative realizations, shown for different minimum subhalo masses \(m_{sub,min}=10^{4}\) – \(10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) (see legend). In the pure geometric-optics limit, \(I(\tau)\) would be constant (for a quadratic minimum) with normalization proportional to the macro magnification. Including progressively lower-mass subhalos introduces localized distortions in the shape of \(I(\tau)\) , while leaving its overall normalization largely unchanged. These distortions are responsible for the frequency-dependent structure of the amplification factor \(F(w)\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：三个代表性实现的无量纲费马势 \(I(\tau)\) 的分布，针对不同的最小子晕质量 \(m_{sub,min}=10^{4}\) – \(10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) 显示（见图例）。在纯几何光学极限下，\(I(\tau)\) 将是常数（对于二次最小值），其归一化与宏观放大率成正比。包含逐渐更低质量的子晕会在 \(I(\tau)\) 的形状中引入局部畸变，同时其整体归一化基本保持不变。这些畸变导致了放大因子 \(F(w)\) 的频率相关结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Frequency-domain amplification factor \(|F(f)|\) computed without the external macro field. The same three realizations and mass thresholds as in Fig. 3 are shown. Across the LISA band, the amplification factor is nearly frequency-independent, with only weak broadband curvature and no prominent oscillatory structure.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在没有外部宏观场的情况下计算的频域放大因子 \(|F(f)|\) 。显示了与图3相同的三个实现和质量阈值。在整个LISA频段内，放大因子几乎与频率无关，仅具有微弱的宽带曲率，没有明显的振荡结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Amplification factors for 50 individual realizations of the subhalo population. The top panel shows the absolute amplification \(|F(f)|\) , the middle panel displays the fractional modulation \(|F(f)/F(0.1\,{Hz})|-1\) , and the bottom panel presents the phase shift \(\arg F(f)\) . Blue curves correspond to different Monte Carlo realizations of the subhalo distribution, while three representative realizations (the same as in the main text) are highlighted in red. Although the detailed interference pattern varies between realizations, the overall modulation amplitude and characteristic frequency scale remain similar.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：子晕种群的50个独立实现的放大因子。顶部面板显示绝对放大 \(|F(f)|\) ，中部面板显示分数调制 \(|F(f)/F(0.1\,{Hz})|-1\) ，底部面板显示相位偏移 \(\arg F(f)\) 。蓝色曲线对应不同的蒙特卡洛子晕分布实现，而三个代表性实现（与正文中相同）以红色突出显示。尽管详细的干涉图案在不同实现之间有所变化，但整体调制幅度和特征频率尺度保持相似。

title: Cosmology with the line-of-sight shear of strong gravitational lenses
summary: Stage-IV photometric galaxy surveys are designed to measure the position and shapes of billions of galaxies. Their aim is to characterise the large-scale distribution of matter in the Universe using galaxy clustering and weak gravitational lensing. As a byproduct, stage-IV surveys are expected to detect more than a hundred thousand strong gravitational lenses. In this article, we propose the use of weak-lensing perturbations to strong lenses, specifically their line-of-sight (LOS) shear, as a cosmological probe. This new observable allows us to define three new correlation functions: the LOS shear with itself, with galaxy positions, and with galaxy shapes, thereby promoting the standard $3\times 2$pt correlation method to a $6\times 2$pt scheme. We design estimators for these new correlation functions and determine their expectation values as a function of the matter power spectrum. We then derive the analytical expression for the full covariance matrix of the $6\times 2$pt correlation scheme. Considering various scenarios for the stage-IV strong-lensing samples, we demonstrate that the cosmological information carried by the LOS shear of strong lenses will be detectable with a very high signal-to-noise ratio, even in the most pessimistic of cases. Strong lenses are thus extremely promising cosmological probes, whose synergy with galaxy positions and shapes should also contribute to mitigating systematics in stage-IV surveys.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 第四阶段光度星系巡天旨在测量数十亿星系的位置和形状。其目标是利用星系成团性和弱引力透镜效应来表征宇宙中物质的大尺度分布。作为副产品，第四阶段巡天预计将探测到超过十万个强引力透镜。在本文中，我们提出利用弱透镜效应对强透镜的扰动，特别是其视线剪切，作为一种宇宙学探针。这一新的可观测量使我们能够定义三个新的相关函数：视线剪切与自身的相关、视线剪切与星系位置的相关以及视线剪切与星系形状的相关，从而将标准的$3\times 2$pt相关方法提升为$6\times 2$pt方案。我们为这些新的相关函数设计了估计量，并确定了它们作为物质功率谱函数的期望值。然后，我们推导了$6\times 2$pt相关方案完整协方差矩阵的解析表达式。考虑到第四阶段强透镜样本的各种情景，我们证明，即使在最悲观的情况下，强透镜视线剪切所携带的宇宙学信息也将以非常高的信噪比被探测到。因此，强透镜是极具前景的宇宙学探针，它们与星系位置和形状的协同作用也应有助于减轻第四阶段巡天中的系统误差。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，强引力透镜是极具前景的宇宙学探针，其与星系位置和形状的协同作用有助于减少第四阶段巡天的系统误差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : A strong-lensing system where a background galaxy (source), lies behind a foreground galaxy (main deflector), while inhomogeneities near the LOS are treated as tidal perturbations. In the absence of the main lens and LOS perturbations, a point in the source galaxy is observed at \(\bm{\beta}\) ; \(\bm{\theta}\) is an image of that point by the entire system \(\{\text{main deflector}+\text{LOS perturbations}\}\) . The \(2\times 2\) distortion matrices \(\bm{\mathcal{A}}_{{ab}}\) ( \({a,b}\in\{{o,d,s}\}\) ) quantify the effect of the LOS perturbations when a source at (b) is observed from (a).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：一个强透镜系统，其中背景星系（源）位于前景星系（主偏转器）之后，而视线附近的非均匀性被视为潮汐扰动。在没有主透镜和视线扰动的情况下，源星系中的一个点被观测到位于\(\bm{\beta}\)；\(\bm{\theta}\)是该点被整个系统\(\{\text{主偏转器}+\text{视线扰动}\}\)所成的像。\(2\times 2\)畸变矩阵\(\bm{\mathcal{A}}_{{ab}}\)（\({a,b}\in\{{o,d,s}\}\)）量化了当从(a)观测位于(b)的源时视线扰动的影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Stage-IV galaxy surveys will observe the position and apparent ellipticity \(\varepsilon\) of more than a billion galaxies, and more than a hundred thousand strong lenses, from which we should be able to measure the LOS shear \(\gamma_{{LOS}}\) . Measuring all the two-point correlation functions of the galaxy position (P), ellipticity (E) and the LOS shear of lenses (L) defines the \(6\times 2\) pt correlation scheme.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：第四阶段星系巡天将观测超过十亿个星系的位置和视椭圆率\(\varepsilon\)，以及超过十万个强透镜，从中我们应该能够测量视线剪切\(\gamma_{{LOS}}\)。测量星系位置(P)、椭圆率(E)和透镜视线剪切(L)的所有两点相关函数，定义了\(6\times 2\)pt相关方案。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Schematic summary of the galaxy survey setup and some of our notation. The survey footprint \(\mathcal{F}\subset\mathcal{S}^{2}\) contains \(G\) galaxies observed in directions \(\hat{\bm{u}}_{a}\) , and \(L\) strong lenses observed in directions \(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\) . A direction \(\hat{\bm{u}}\) is parameterised by its polar coordinates \((\theta,\varphi)\) ; the angle formed by the directions \(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i},\hat{\bm{u}}_{a}\) is denoted with \(\vartheta_{ia}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：星系巡天设置及部分符号的示意图。巡天覆盖区域\(\mathcal{F}\subset\mathcal{S}^{2}\)包含在方向\(\hat{\bm{u}}_{a}\)上观测到的\(G\)个星系，以及在方向\(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\)上观测到的\(L\)个强透镜。方向\(\hat{\bm{u}}\)由其极坐标\((\theta,\varphi)\)参数化；方向\(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i},\hat{\bm{u}}_{a}\)之间的夹角记为\(\vartheta_{ia}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Left panel: Two directions \(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\) and \(\hat{\bm{u}}_{j}\) on the two-sphere form an angle \(\vartheta_{ij}\) . The figure shows two orthogonal bases for the tangent space \({T}_{i}\mathcal{S}^{2}\) at \(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\) : the coordinate basis \((\hat{\bm{e}}_{\theta},\hat{\bm{e}}_{\varphi})\) in grey; and the \((ij)\) -basis \((\hat{\bm{t}}_{ij},\hat{\bm{n}}_{ij})\) in turquoise. In the latter, \(\hat{\bm{t}}_{ij}\) is tangent to the great circle connecting \(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\) to \(\hat{\bm{u}}_{j}\) , and \(\hat{\bm{n}}_{ij}\equiv\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\times\hat{\bm{t}}_{ij}\) . Both bases form an angle \(\psi_{ij}\) . The \((ij)\) -basis is used to define the plus and cross polarisations of the shear for the couple of directions \((ij)\) . Right panel : The annulus \(\mathcal{A}_{\alpha}(\hat{\bm{u}})\) is defined by the points of \(\mathcal{S}^{2}\) that form an angle \(\vartheta\in[\vartheta_{\alpha},\vartheta_{\alpha+1})\) with \(\hat{\bm{u}}\) . Its intersection with the survey footprint, \(\mathcal{A}_{\alpha}(\hat{\bm{u}})\cap\mathcal{F}\) , represents the \(\alpha\) th angular bin about \(\hat{\bm{u}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：二维球面上的两个方向\(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\)和\(\hat{\bm{u}}_{j}\)形成夹角\(\vartheta_{ij}\)。该图显示了\(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\)处切空间\({T}_{i}\mathcal{S}^{2}\)的两个正交基：灰色的坐标基\((\hat{\bm{e}}_{\theta},\hat{\bm{e}}_{\varphi})\)；以及青绿色的\((ij)\)-基\((\hat{\bm{t}}_{ij},\hat{\bm{n}}_{ij})\)。在后一个基中，\(\hat{\bm{t}}_{ij}\)与连接\(\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\)和\(\hat{\bm{u}}_{j}\)的大圆相切，而\(\hat{\bm{n}}_{ij}\equiv\hat{\bm{u}}_{i}\times\hat{\bm{t}}_{ij}\)。两个基形成夹角\(\psi_{ij}\)。\((ij)\)-基用于定义方向对\((ij)\)的剪切的正交和交叉极化。右图：环形区域\(\mathcal{A}_{\alpha}(\hat{\bm{u}})\)由\(\mathcal{S}^{2}\)中与\(\hat{\bm{u}}\)形成夹角\(\vartheta\in[\vartheta_{\alpha},\vartheta_{\alpha+1})\)的点定义。它与巡天覆盖区域的交集\(\mathcal{A}_{\alpha}(\hat{\bm{u}})\cap\mathcal{F}\)表示关于\(\hat{\bm{u}}\)的第\(\alpha\)个角度分箱。

title: Hierarchical cosmological constraints through strong lensing distance ratio
summary: Strong gravitational lensing provides an independent and powerful probe of cosmic expansion by directly linking observables to cosmological distances. Upcoming surveys such as LSST will discover large number of galaxy-galaxy strong lensing systems, offering a new route to precise cosmological constraints. In this paper, we propose a Fisher-like sensitivity factor to map how the cosmological information of strong-lensing distances changes across the lens-source redshift plane. Applying such factor to the distance ratio $D_{ls}/D_s$, the time-delay distance $D_{Δt}$, and the double-source-plane ratio, we determine the ``sensitivity valleys'' where an observable becomes insensitive to a given parameter. The realistically simulated LSST lens population, which largely lies outside the distance-ratio valleys, covers the most sensitive region for $(w_0,w_a)$ parameter space. We then develop a new hierarchical framework, which could calibrate the redshift evolution of lens mass-density slopes and constrain cosmological parameters simultaneously. Focusing on the LSST mock data, we demonstrate that ignoring mass-profile evolution can bias $Ω_m$ by up to $\sim 10σ$, while modeling the lens evolution could perfectly recovers the fiducial cosmology and yield stringent cosmological constraints (e.g., $ΔΩ_m \simeq 0.01$ and $Δw \simeq 0.1$ for $\sim 10^4$ lenses).

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种Fisher-like敏感度因子来分析强引力透镜观测中的宇宙学信息分布，并开发了新的层次框架来同时校准透镜质量密度斜率的红移演化和约束宇宙学参数。
AI.motivation: 随着LSST等巡天项目将发现大量星系-星系强透镜系统，需要有效方法来利用这些数据精确约束宇宙学参数，同时处理透镜质量剖面演化的系统误差。
AI.method: 1) 提出Fisher-like敏感度因子来映射透镜-源红移平面上宇宙学信息的变化；2) 识别不同观测量的"敏感度谷"区域；3) 开发新的层次框架同时校准透镜质量密度斜率的红移演化和约束宇宙学参数。

AI.conclusion: 强引力透镜是独立且强大的宇宙学探针，新提出的敏感度分析和层次框架能够有效利用LSST等巡天的大量透镜数据，同时处理系统误差并获得精确的宇宙学约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜通过直接联系可观测量与宇宙学距离，提供了独立且强大的宇宙膨胀探针。即将开展的巡天项目（如LSST）将发现大量星系-星系强透镜系统，为精确的宇宙学约束开辟新途径。本文提出了一种类似Fisher矩阵的敏感度因子，用以描绘强透镜距离的宇宙学信息在透镜-源红移平面上的变化。将该因子应用于距离比$D_{ls}/D_s$、时间延迟距离$D_{Δt}$以及双源面比，我们确定了可观测量对给定参数不敏感的“敏感度低谷”。基于实际模拟的LSST透镜样本（大部分位于距离比低谷之外）覆盖了$(w_0,w_a)$参数空间中最敏感的区域。随后，我们开发了一个新的层次化框架，能够同时校准透镜质量密度斜率随红移的演化并约束宇宙学参数。针对LSST模拟数据，我们证明忽略质量轮廓演化会使$Ω_m$产生高达$\sim 10σ$的偏差，而对透镜演化进行建模则能完美恢复基准宇宙学模型，并给出严格的宇宙学约束（例如，对于$\sim 10^4$个透镜，$ΔΩ_m \simeq 0.01$，$Δw \simeq 0.1$）。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：强引力透镜是独立且强大的宇宙学探针，新提出的敏感度分析和层次框架能够有效利用LSST等巡天的大量透镜数据，同时处理系统误差并获得精确的宇宙学约束。

title: Mature but Still Growing: JWST Detection of the Earliest Intracluster Light at z ~ 2
summary: We present a JWST analysis of intracluster light (ICL) in XLSSC 122 at z = 1.98, currently the most distant known strong lensing galaxy cluster with an evolved member population. Using deep JWST imaging complemented by HST data and careful control of systematics, we robustly detect diffuse emission extending to several hundred kpc from the brightest cluster galaxy (BCG) down to about 29 mag arcsec^-2. Multi component PSF convolved Sersic modeling separates the surface brightness profiles into three components: a BCG core, a BCG envelope, and an ICL component, with stable Sersic indices across wavelengths. Nearly flat color profiles indicate minimal radial variation in the stellar populations of the BCG envelope and the ICL. The median ICL fraction measured across seven bands is about 17 percent, demonstrating that the buildup of intracluster stars in massive halos was already well underway by z about 2. The ICL fraction peaks near 5000 Angstrom in the rest frame, resembling the behavior observed in dynamically active clusters. We also detect a southern excess of ICL relative to the best fit Sersic model and quantify it using wavelet based modeling, providing additional support that this system is dynamically active. The BCG + ICL light distribution and strong lensing mass map show strong morphological agreement within about 100 kpc. These findings establish the ICL as an early forming and dynamically informative component of massive halos.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现红移z=1.98的星系团XLSSC 122中已存在显著的星系内光（ICL），表明大质量晕中星系内恒星的积聚在宇宙早期（约100亿年前）已在进行。
AI.motivation: 研究宇宙早期（红移z≈2）星系团中星系内光（ICL）的形成和演化，了解大质量晕中恒星积聚的时间尺度，探索ICL作为星系团动力学活动指示器的潜力。
AI.method: 使用JWST深度成像数据，结合HST数据，通过多分量PSF卷积Sersic模型将表面亮度分布分解为三个成分：BCG核心、BCG包层和ICL成分；采用小波基模型量化ICL的南向过量；比较BCG+ICL光分布与强引力透镜质量分布。
AI.result: 在红移z=1.98的星系团中稳健检测到延伸数百kpc的弥散发射；ICL比例约17%，表明星系内恒星积聚在z≈2时已显著进行；ICL比例在5000Å处达到峰值，与动力学活跃星系团特征一致；检测到ICL南向过量，支持系统处于动力学活跃状态；BCG+ICL光分布与强透镜质量分布在100kpc内形态一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了JWST对红移z=1.98的XLSSC 122星系团内光（ICL）的分析，这是目前已知最遥远的强透镜星系团，拥有演化的成员星系群。利用深JWST成像，辅以HST数据和对系统误差的仔细控制，我们稳健地探测到从最亮团星系（BCG）延伸至数百千秒差距的弥散发射，表面亮度低至约29星等每平方角秒。多分量PSF卷积Sérsic模型将表面亮度轮廓分解为三个分量：BCG核、BCG包层和ICL分量，其Sérsic指数在不同波段间保持稳定。近乎平坦的颜色轮廓表明BCG包层和ICL的恒星种群在径向上变化极小。在七个波段中测得的ICL中值比例约为17%，表明在大质量晕中，团内恒星的积聚在红移z≈2时已显著进行。ICL比例在静止系约5000埃处达到峰值，与动力学活跃星系团中观测到的行为相似。我们还探测到相对于最佳拟合Sérsic模型的南部ICL过量，并通过基于小波的建模进行量化，进一步支持该系统处于动力学活跃状态。BCG+ICL的光分布与强透镜质量图在约100千秒差距内显示出强烈的形态一致性。这些发现确立了ICL作为大质量晕中早期形成且具有动力学信息的分量。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，星系内光是早期形成且具有动力学信息的大质量晕成分，其积聚在宇宙早期（红移z≈2）已显著进行，ICL可作为星系团动力学活动的有效示踪物。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Multiband SB Profiles and Model Decomposition. The top row displays HST observations (F814W, F105W, and F140W), while the bottom row presents JWST/NIRCam observations (F090W, F200W, F277W, and F356W). Black data points represent the observed median SB within elliptical bins, with error bars accounting for the quadrature sum of flux uncertainties and systematic sky error ( \(\sigma_{sky}\) ). Horizontal dot-dashed lines indicate the limiting SB ( \(\mu_{lim}\) ) for each respective band. The red solid line denotes the best-fit multi-component Sérsic model convolved with the telescope PSF. The model is decomposed into three distinct stellar components: the BCG core (blue dotted line), the BCG envelope (orange dot-dashed line), and the diffuse ICL (green dashed line). The last components (green dashed line) are utilized for the ICL analysis in this work. Lower subpanels show the residuals ( \(\Delta\mu\) ) between the observed data and the total model.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：多波段表面亮度轮廓与模型分解。顶行显示HST观测（F814W、F105W和F140W），底行显示JWST/NIRCam观测（F090W、F200W、F277W和F356W）。黑色数据点表示椭圆环内观测到的中值表面亮度，误差棒包含流量不确定度和系统天空误差（\(\sigma_{sky}\)）的平方和。水平点划线表示各波段的极限表面亮度（\(\mu_{lim}\)）。红色实线表示与望远镜PSF卷积后的最佳拟合多分量Sérsic模型。该模型分解为三个不同的恒星分量：BCG核（蓝色点线）、BCG包层（橙色点划线）和弥散ICL（绿色虚线）。最后的分量（绿色虚线）用于本工作中的ICL分析。下方子图显示观测数据与总模型之间的残差（\(\Delta\mu\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Radial color profiles of the BCG+ICL derived from six adjacent filter pairs. Shaded regions represent the 68% confidence interval, incorporating both statistical flux uncertainties and systematic sky background errors ( \(\sigma_{sky}\) ). The inner gray region ( \(\lesssim 1\) kpc) indicates the area where differences in PSF widths between HST and JWST may induce artificial color gradients. Beyond this scale, the color profiles remain remarkably flat within the error margins, suggesting a spatially uniform stellar population across the BCG envelope and ICL. A notable exception is the F814W \(-\) F090W profile, which exhibits variation at \(3\lesssimSMA\lesssim 10\) kpc, potentially indicating radial differences such as dust attenuation within the central galaxy (see text).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：由六个相邻滤光片对导出的BCG+ICL径向颜色轮廓。阴影区域表示68%置信区间，包含统计流量不确定度和系统天空背景误差（\(\sigma_{sky}\)）。内部灰色区域（\(\lesssim 1\) kpc）表示HST和JWST之间PSF宽度的差异可能引起人为颜色梯度。在此尺度之外，颜色轮廓在误差范围内保持非常平坦，表明BCG包层和ICL中的恒星种群在空间上均匀。一个显著的例外是F814W \(-\) F090W轮廓，在\(3\lesssim SMA \lesssim 10\) kpc处表现出变化，可能指示中心星系内的径向差异，如尘埃消光（见正文）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: ICL fraction ( \(f_{ICL}\) ) as a function of rest-frame wavelength. The red crosses represent the measurements for XLSSC 122 ( \(z=1.98\) ) across the seven observed bands. For comparison, pink (sky blue) points indicate \(f_{ICL}\) in dynamically active (relaxed) clusters measured by Jiménez-Teja et al. ( 2018 , 2021 ); de Oliveira et al. ( 2022 ); Jiménez-Teja et al. ( 2025 ); de Oliveira et al. ( 2025 ) . The \(f_{ICL}\) values for XLSSC 122 exhibit a characteristic local maximum near 4800 Å , a pattern that closely resembles the trends found in dynamically active or merging systems.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：ICL比例（\(f_{ICL}\)）随静止系波长的变化。红色十字表示XLSSC 122（\(z=1.98\)）在七个观测波段上的测量值。作为比较，粉色（天蓝色）点表示由Jiménez-Teja等人（2018, 2021）；de Oliveira等人（2022）；Jiménez-Teja等人（2025）；de Oliveira等人（2025）测量的动力学活跃（松弛）星系团中的\(f_{ICL}\)。XLSSC 122的\(f_{ICL}\)值在4800 Å附近呈现特征性的局部最大值，这一模式与动力学活跃或并合系统中的趋势非常相似。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Localization of non-Sérsic diffuse emission in XLSSC 122. The left column presents JWST/NIRCam images (F200W, F277W, and F356W) following the subtraction of the best-fit 2D Sérsic ICL (diffuse) component, revealing a prominent residual signal to the south. The middle column displays the isolated model of this additional diffuse component as detected by the wavelet-based algorithm DAWIS . The right column shows the final residual maps after subtracting both the global Sérsic and local DAWIS models. This southern feature represents a significant excess of diffuse emission extending approximately 100 kpc from the BCG. Its spatial alignment with the overdensity of member galaxies and independent multi-wavelength asymmetries (X-ray, radio, and SZ) strongly suggests an origin in tidally stripped stars resulting from ongoing or recent dynamical interactions within the cluster.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：XLSSC 122中非Sérsic弥散发射的定位。左列显示减去最佳拟合二维Sérsic ICL（弥散）分量后的JWST/NIRCam图像（F200W、F277W和F356W），揭示了南部显著的残差信号。中列显示由基于小波的算法DAWIS检测到的这一额外弥散分量的孤立模型。右列显示减去全局Sérsic和局部DAWIS模型后的最终残差图。这一南部特征代表了从BCG延伸约100千秒差距的显著弥散发射过量。其与成员星系超密度的空间对齐以及独立的多波段不对称性（X射线、射电和SZ）强烈表明，其起源于星系团内正在进行的或最近的动力学相互作用导致的潮汐剥离恒星。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between the mass distribution and diffuse stellar light in XLSSC 122. Top left: The radial profile of the mass-to-light ratio ( \(\kappa/\mu\) ) is derived from the SL mass map and the F356W SB profile. The ratio follows a linear relation ( \(\kappa/\mu\propto r\) ) up to \(r\sim 100\) kpc, the regime where the SL model constraints are most robust. Right: A two-dimensional comparison between the SL mass distribution (red contours) and the smoothed stellar light distribution of the combined BCG + ICL + member galaxies (blue contours and gray scales) is presented. Bottom left: The orange curve illustrates the OC between the light and mass contours, while the green curve displays the MHD. Both metrics consistently indicate that the overall morphological similarity between mass and diffuse light components remains high up to \(r\sim 180\) kpc. The slight decrease in similarly beyond \(r\sim 60\) kpc is attributed to the presence of the southern ICL excess and the lack of the SL constraints.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：XLSSC 122中质量分布与弥散恒星光的比较。左上：质光比（\(\kappa/\mu\)）的径向轮廓由SL质量图和F356W表面亮度轮廓导出。该比值在\(r\sim 100\) kpc内遵循线性关系（\(\kappa/\mu\propto r\)），这是SL模型约束最稳健的区域。右：展示了SL质量分布（红色等高线）与平滑后的BCG+ICL+成员星系恒星光分布（蓝色等高线和灰度）之间的二维比较。左下：橙色曲线展示了光与质量等高线之间的OC，绿色曲线展示了MHD。这两个指标一致表明，在\(r\sim 180\) kpc内，质量与弥散光分量之间的整体形态相似性保持较高。在\(r\sim 60\) kpc之外相似性的轻微下降归因于南部ICL过量的存在以及SL约束的缺乏。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Example of modeling the 1/f noise. Panel (a) shows the original image. Panels (b) and (c) present the modeled 1/f noise and the denoised image obtained with our algorithm described in Appendix A.1 . Panels (d) and (e) show the output of the JWST pipeline algorithm ( clean_flicker_noise ). Panel (f) illustrates the difference between the two algorithms. Our algorithm effectively avoids over-correction near bright sources and better preserves diffuse emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：1/f噪声建模示例。面板(a)显示原始图像。面板(b)和(c)展示了使用附录A.1中描述的算法建模的1/f噪声和去噪后的图像。面板(d)和(e)显示了JWST流水线算法（clean_flicker_noise）的输出。面板(f)展示了两种算法之间的差异。我们的算法有效避免了明亮源附近的过度校正，并更好地保留了弥散发射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: (Top) Color-composite image of XLSSC 122 with red for F356W, green for F277W, and blue for F090W+F200W. The cyan boxes indicate spectroscopically confirmed member galaxies and magenta boxes show photometric members. The red contours show the smoothed number density distribution of all known member galaxies. (Bottom) Color-magnitude diagram of the JWST XLSSC 122 field. Black dots indicate all detected sources. Red and orange dots show spectroscopically and photometrically selected member galaxies, respectively. The star represents the BCG.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：（顶）XLSSC 122的彩色合成图像，红色为F356W，绿色为F277W，蓝色为F090W+F200W。青色方框表示光谱确认的成员星系，品红色方框表示测光成员。红色等高线显示了所有已知成员星系的平滑数密度分布。（底）JWST XLSSC 122场的颜色-星等图。黑点表示所有探测到的源。红点和橙点分别表示光谱和测光选择的成员星系。星形表示BCG。

title: Exploring gas thermodynamics around galaxies from the Sunyaev-Zel'dovich effects: impact of galaxy-halo connection, 2D projection and velocity field
summary: A complete picture of the gas thermodynamics around galaxies is imprinted on the cosmic microwave background (CMB). Indeed, the thermal, kinematic, and relativistic Sunyaev-Zel'dovich effects (tSZ, kSZ, rSZ) measure the gas density, temperature, pressure of baryonic feedback and bulk velocity around galaxies, along with the gravitational potential it sits in. This full thermodynamic picture promises to constrain galaxy formation models and gas related uncertainties in the impact on galaxy lensing. Recent kSZ measurements around galaxies suggest that the gas may be more extended than anticipated, pointing to powerful feedback processes and large baryonic corrections to lensing. How robust are these conclusions about the galaxy-halo connection, including satellite fraction and high-mass outliers, or to 2D projection effects and large-scale velocity modes? In this paper, we give estimates for these effects using a simulated sample of DESI-like luminous red galaxies within the IllustrisTNG hydrodynamical simulation and the Abacus N-body simulation. We show that analyzing projected 2D profiles can lead to biases when computing quantities like the gas fraction. We also find that in the absence of spatial filtering, the 2-halo term is non-negligible for kSZ even at the smaller radii where the 1-halo term dominates. We show that a 1% uncertainty in the satellite fraction of galaxies can propagate into uncertainties of $\pm$1%, $\pm$3% and $\pm$5% in the 1-halo terms of the kSZ, tSZ, and rSZ signals, respectively. We show that masking the 2% most massive objects in the sample reduces the profile amplitudes by up to 10%, 40%, and 75% for the kSZ, tSZ, and rSZ signals, respectively. Finally, we show that naive simulations of the kSZ effect can be biased by an artificial Doppler term, which is automatically removed when high-pass or compensated aperture filtering is applied.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用模拟数据分析了星系周围气体的热力学特性对SZ效应测量的影响，揭示了2D投影分析可能导致偏差，卫星星系比例和大质量天体对SZ信号有显著影响。
AI.motivation: 星系周围气体的热力学特性对理解星系形成模型和引力透镜中的气体相关不确定性至关重要。最近的kSZ测量表明气体可能比预期更延展，指向强大的反馈过程和大尺度重子修正。需要评估这些结论对星系-晕连接、卫星星系比例、大质量天体异常值、2D投影效应和大尺度速度模式的稳健性。
AI.method: 使用IllustrisTNG流体动力学模拟和Abacus N体模拟中的DESI类亮红星系模拟样本，分析SZ效应（tSZ、kSZ、rSZ）的测量。研究2D投影剖面分析、卫星星系比例不确定性、大质量天体掩蔽、2晕项贡献以及人工多普勒项偏差等问题。
AI.result: 1) 分析2D投影剖面可能导致气体分数等量的偏差；2) 在没有空间滤波的情况下，即使在小半径处1晕项占主导，2晕项对kSZ仍不可忽略；3) 卫星星系比例1%的不确定性会传播到kSZ、tSZ、rSZ的1晕项信号中，分别产生±1%、±3%、±5%的不确定性；4) 掩蔽样本中2%最大质量天体可使kSZ、tSZ、rSZ剖面振幅分别降低10%、40%、75%；5) 简单的kSZ效应模拟可能受到人工多普勒项偏差，应用高通或补偿孔径滤波可自动消除。
AI.conclusion: 星系周围气体热力学特性的SZ效应测量受到多种系统效应的影响，包括投影效应、卫星星系比例、大质量天体贡献和模拟偏差。准确解释观测数据需要考虑这些因素，特别是对于约束星系形成模型和引力透镜中的重子修正。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系周围气体热力学的完整图景印刻在宇宙微波背景（CMB）上。实际上，热、运动学和相对论性Sunyaev-Zel'dovich效应（tSZ、kSZ、rSZ）测量了星系周围的重子反馈气体密度、温度、压力和整体速度，以及其所处的引力势。这一完整的热力学图景有望约束星系形成模型以及气体对星系透镜效应影响的相关不确定性。最近围绕星系的kSZ测量表明，气体可能比预期的更延展，指向强大的反馈过程和对透镜效应的大幅重子修正。这些关于星系-晕连接（包括卫星星系比例和高质量离群值）的结论有多稳健？或者对于二维投影效应和大尺度速度模式呢？在本文中，我们利用IllustrisTNG流体动力学模拟和Abacus N体模拟中的DESI-like亮红星系模拟样本，对这些效应进行了估计。我们表明，在计算气体分数等量时，分析投影的二维轮廓可能导致偏差。我们还发现，在没有空间滤波的情况下，即使在1-halo项占主导的较小半径处，2-halo项对于kSZ也是不可忽略的。我们表明，星系卫星星系比例1%的不确定性可分别传播为kSZ、tSZ和rSZ信号1-halo项中±1%、±3%和±5%的不确定性。我们表明，屏蔽样本中最庞大的2%天体，会使kSZ、tSZ和rSZ信号的轮廓振幅分别降低高达10%、40%和75%。最后，我们表明，对kSZ效应的朴素模拟可能因人为的多普勒项而产生偏差，当应用高通或补偿孔径滤波时，该项会自动移除。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：星系周围气体热力学特性的SZ效应测量受到多种系统效应的影响，包括投影效应、卫星星系比例、大质量天体贡献和模拟偏差。准确解释观测数据需要考虑这些因素，特别是对于约束星系形成模型和引力透镜中的重子修正。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : From top to bottom, the panels illustrate tests for the convergence scales of the 2-halo term contributions to the 3D and 2D matter distributions, as well as to velocities. The curves are plotted such that the integral corresponds to the area under the curve, accounting for the logarithmic scaling of the radius. Top panel: When calculated using 3D spherical shells, the mass contribution from the two-halo term, computed analytically using both the linear (continuous) and nonlinear (dashed) correlation functions, exhibits poor convergence, with significant contributions extending beyond approximately \(\sim 5\) Gpc/ \(h\) . Middle panel: In contrast, the 2D version of this mass term, calculated using cylindrical shells, converges at much smaller scales, around 150 cMpc/ \(h\) (cMpc stands for comoving Mpc). This indicates that the box size of the IllustrisTNG-300 simulation is sufficient for studies requiring convergence of projected mass profiles. Lower panel: For analyses involving the kSZ effect, the velocity correlation function, shown for both linear and non-linear theory (black), does not fully converge within the volume of IllustrisTNG-300 but does so in larger simulations such as AbacusSummit. This convergence is critical for constraining the contribution of the Doppler term to the kSZ signal, as \(\xi_{vv}\) serves as the integrand for the Doppler component (see Eq. 11 and note the constant mean number density).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：从上到下，各面板展示了针对二维和三维物质分布以及速度的2-halo项贡献收敛尺度的测试。曲线绘制使得积分对应于曲线下的面积，并考虑了半径的对数标度。上面板：当使用三维球壳计算时，使用线性（连续线）和非线性（虚线）相关函数解析计算的2-halo项的质量贡献表现出较差的收敛性，显著贡献延伸至超过\(\sim 5\) Gpc/ \(h\)。中间面板：相比之下，使用圆柱壳计算的该质量项的二维版本在更小的尺度（约150 cMpc/ \(h\)）处收敛（cMpc表示共动Mpc）。这表明IllustrisTNG-300模拟的盒子尺寸足以满足需要投影质量轮廓收敛的研究。下面板：对于涉及kSZ效应的分析，以线性和非线性理论（黑色）显示的速度相关函数在IllustrisTNG-300的体积内并未完全收敛，但在更大的模拟（如AbacusSummit）中则收敛。这种收敛对于约束多普勒项对kSZ信号的贡献至关重要，因为\(\xi_{vv}\)是多普勒分量的被积函数（参见方程11并注意恒定的平均数密度）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : From left to right, profiles of projected gas density, projected pressure, and projected relativistic corrections to the pressure as a function of radius, as defined in Eqs. 8 , 4 and 6 , respectively. These profiles are separated into the 1-halo term (solid line), which dominates at smaller scales ( \(\lesssim\) 1 cMpc \(/h\) ), and the projected 2-halo term (dashed line), which dominates at larger scales. From left to right, as the mass dependence increases ( \(M\) , \(M^{5/3}\) , and \(M^{7/3}\) , respectively), we observe a decreasing contribution from the 2-halo term, as the projected profile becomes increasingly dominated by massive halos from neighboring clusters. This trend is accompanied by increasing noise, which is further exaggerated by the logarithmic scale of the plots. In the specific case of the projected relativistic SZ, the contribution of the 2-halo term is on the order of a few percent.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从左到右，分别为投影气体密度、投影压力和投影相对论修正压力随半径变化的轮廓，分别如方程8、4和6所定义。这些轮廓被分为在较小尺度（\(\lesssim\) 1 cMpc \(/h\)）占主导的1-halo项（实线）和在较大尺度占主导的投影2-halo项（虚线）。从左到右，随着质量依赖性的增加（分别为\(M\)、\(M^{5/3}\)和\(M^{7/3}\)），我们观察到2-halo项的贡献递减，因为投影轮廓越来越受邻近星团中大质量晕的主导。这一趋势伴随着噪声的增加，而图的对数尺度进一步放大了噪声。在投影相对论SZ的具体情况下，2-halo项的贡献约为百分之几。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The first two panels show the 2D projected and 3D density profiles: baryons are plotted with dash-dotted lines, and total matter (baryons + dark matter) with dashed lines. The upper panel presents the 2D profiles, and the middle panel the 3D ones, with the corresponding 1-halo and 2-halo terms shown faintly. The lower panel displays the ratio of gas to total matter density for both 2D (black) and 3D (blue) profiles. While the 3D ratio converges to the expected value of \(\Omega_{b}/\Omega_{m}\) (indicated by the dotted black line), the 2D ratio does not and instead overestimates it, illustrating that gas fractions may not be trivially inferred from projected profiles.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：前两个面板显示了二维投影和三维密度轮廓：重子用点划线绘制，总物质（重子+暗物质）用虚线绘制。上面板显示二维轮廓，中间面板显示三维轮廓，相应的1-halo和2-halo项以浅色显示。下面板显示了二维（黑色）和三维（蓝色）轮廓的气体与总物质密度之比。虽然三维比率收敛到预期的\(\Omega_{b}/\Omega_{m}\)值（由黑色虚线表示），但二维比率并未收敛，反而高估了它，说明气体分数不能简单地从投影轮廓推断出来。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Similar to Fig. 2 , except this figure splits the LRG sample into central (black) and satellite (grey) galaxies. Satellites tend to reside in larger halos, which have higher mass and are surrounded by more massive neighbors. Their 1-halo and 2-halo terms are thus larger than for centrals. This effect is especially pronounced in pressure and projected relativistic SZ, as these quantities have an even steeper mass dependence. However, given the total number of satellites is lower than the centrals, their contribution to the average profiles for centrals plus satellites is reduced by their fraction compared to the curves shown.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图2类似，但此图将LRG样本分为中央星系（黑色）和卫星星系（灰色）。卫星星系倾向于居住在更大的晕中，这些晕质量更高且被更庞大的邻居包围。因此，它们的1-halo和2-halo项比中央星系更大。这种效应在压力和投影相对论SZ中尤为明显，因为这些量具有更陡的质量依赖性。然而，由于卫星星系的总数低于中央星系，它们对中央星系加卫星星系平均轮廓的贡献按其比例相对于所示曲线有所降低。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : The top panels show the projected 2D profiles of gas density, pressure, and relativistic SZ for varying satellite fractions, and their fractional errors within a \(\pm 1\%\) (white), \(\pm 5\%\) (light gray) and \(\pm 10\%\) (gray) bands in the lower panels. Each profile represents a linear combination of the central and satellite profiles from Fig. 4 , with a satellite fraction of 20 \(\%\pm 1\%\) , \(20\pm 3\%\) and \(20\pm 7\%\) . The fiducial satellite fraction, denoted as \(f_{sat}\) , corresponds to 20 \(\%\) . From left to right, a \(\pm\) 1 \(\%\) change in the fiducial satellite fraction results in an increasing fractional error, reaching up to 2 \(\%\) for the projected gas density, \(\sim 4\%\) for the projected pressure, and 5 \(\%\) for the relativistic SZ profile. This allows us to quantify the maximum allowable uncertainty in \(f_{sat}\) to ensure that its propagated error to the SZ profiles (shape and amplitude) remains constrained by certain percentage.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：上面板显示了不同卫星星系比例下气体密度、压力和相对论SZ的投影二维轮廓，下面板显示了在\(\pm 1\%\)（白色）、\(\pm 5\%\)（浅灰色）和\(\pm 10\%\)（灰色）带内的分数误差。每个轮廓代表图4中中央星系和卫星星系轮廓的线性组合，卫星星系比例分别为20 \(\%\pm 1\%\)、\(20\pm 3\%\)和\(20\pm 7\%\)。基准卫星星系比例记为\(f_{sat}\)，对应20 \(\%\)。从左到右，基准卫星星系比例变化\(\pm\) 1 \(\%\)导致分数误差增加，投影气体密度最高达2 \(\%\)，投影压力约\(\sim 4\%\)，相对论SZ轮廓达5 \(\%\)。这使我们能够量化\(f_{sat}\)的最大允许不确定性，以确保其对SZ轮廓（形状和振幅）的传播误差保持在特定百分比内。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : The projected Doppler terms for IllustrisTNG (in gray) and AbacusSummit (in blue) are shown here as flat dotted lines. The kSZ temperature shift of the 1-halo and 2-halo terms, excluding the Doppler contribution, are displayed as solid and dashed lines, respectively. We have used \(v_{\parallel}=v_{\parallel}^{RMS}\) from the simulations. As anticipated from Fig. 1 , as the cylinder length increases, the contribution from the Doppler term decreases.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：IllustrisTNG（灰色）和AbacusSummit（蓝色）的投影多普勒项在此显示为平坦虚线。排除多普勒贡献的1-halo和2-halo项的kSZ温度偏移分别显示为实线和虚线。我们使用了来自模拟的\(v_{\parallel}=v_{\parallel}^{RMS}\)。正如从图1预期的，随着圆柱长度的增加，多普勒项的贡献减小。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : The CAP-filtered kSZ profile was computed for IllustrisTNG (denoted by 205 cMpc/ \(h\) in dashed gray) and AbacusSummit (denoted by 2000 cMpc/ \(h\) in solid black). As the cylinder length increases, the profile converges to a well-defined curve, as shown in the residual plot below.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：CAP滤波后的kSZ轮廓针对IllustrisTNG（以205 cMpc/ \(h\)表示，灰色虚线）和AbacusSummit（以2000 cMpc/ \(h\)表示，黑色实线）进行了计算。随着圆柱长度的增加，轮廓收敛到一条明确的曲线，如下方的残差图所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 9 : Similar to Fig. 2 , but now focusing on the 3D distributions, we find that the 2-halo term becomes relevant only at larger radii. The simulation average quantity is shown in red. Moreover, its relative contribution diminishes with increasing mass dependence, being less significant for quantities like pressure and the relativistic SZ compared to gas density.
figures.caption_zh: 图9：与图2类似，但现在关注三维分布，我们发现2-halo项仅在更大半径处变得相关。模拟平均量以红色显示。此外，其相对贡献随着质量依赖性的增加而减小，对于压力和相对论SZ等量，其重要性低于气体密度。

title: A new wideband radio polarization observation of the Supernova Remnant G315.4$-$2.3
comment: Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: The supernova remnant (SNR) G315.4$-$2.3 (MSH 14$-$63 or RCW 86) exhibits strong emission across the electromagnetic spectrum. Radio polarization observations probe magnetic fields and will help to understand the evolution of the SNR. We aim to investigate the radio spectrum and magnetic field properties of the SNR. We observed G315.4$-$2.3 using the Australia Telescope Compact Array (ATCA), covering the frequency range of 1.1-3.1 GHz. We performed rotation measure (RM) synthesis on the $Q$ and $U$ frequency cubes to obtain polarized intensity and RM. The regular component of the line-of-sight magnetic field was estimated from RM. The fractional polarization versus wavelength squared was used to constrain the properties of the turbulent magnetic field. We obtained image cubes of Stokes $I$, $Q$, and $U$, along with images of polarized intensity $P$, RM, and fractional polarization $p$. The radio spectra are very similar for different areas of the SNR. The foreground RM was estimated to be 55 rad m$^{-2}$, and the internal RM of most SNR areas is less than about 50 rad m$^{-2}$. The regular magnetic field along the line of sight was estimated to be about 1.4 $μ$G in the southwest, much smaller than the total magnetic field. For most parts of the southwest and northeast, $p$ is less than 8% and is nearly constant with $λ^2$. We estimated the ratio of turbulent to regular magnetic field to be larger than about 3. The scale of the turbulent magnetic field for some area in the northwest might be smaller than about 0.4 pc. The radio characteristics, including spectrum and turbulent magnetic field, are very similar in the northeast and southwest, even though the evolution is quite different for these two regions based on the current models. These should be taken into account for future modeling of the evolution of the SNR.

AI.tldr: 利用ATCA观测超新星遗迹G315.4-2.3的射电偏振特性，分析其磁场结构和演化特征

AI.method: 使用澳大利亚望远镜紧凑阵列(ATCA)在1.1-3.1 GHz频率范围内观测，通过RM合成技术处理Q和U频率立方体，获得偏振强度和旋转量。利用RM估算视线方向规则磁场分量，通过偏振分数与波长平方的关系约束湍流磁场特性。
AI.result: 获得I、Q、U斯托克斯参数图像立方体及偏振强度P、RM、偏振分数p图像。不同区域的射电频谱相似；前景RM为55 rad m⁻²，大部分遗迹内部RM小于50 rad m⁻²；西南部视线方向规则磁场约1.4 μG，远小于总磁场；大部分区域p小于8%且随λ²基本不变；湍流与规则磁场比值大于3；西北部某些区域湍流磁场尺度可能小于0.4 pc。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超新星遗迹（SNR）G315.4$-$2.3（MSH 14$-$63 或 RCW 86）在电磁波谱上表现出强烈的辐射。射电偏振观测可以探测磁场，有助于理解该超新星遗迹的演化。我们旨在研究该超新星遗迹的射电频谱和磁场特性。我们使用澳大利亚望远镜致密阵列（ATCA）对G315.4$-$2.3进行了观测，覆盖频率范围为1.1-3.1 GHz。我们对$Q$和$U$频率立方体进行了旋转测量（RM）合成，以获得偏振强度和RM。视线方向的规则磁场分量通过RM估算。利用偏振分数与波长平方的关系来约束湍流磁场的性质。我们获得了斯托克斯$I$、$Q$和$U$的图像立方体，以及偏振强度$P$、RM和偏振分数$p$的图像。超新星遗迹不同区域的射电频谱非常相似。前景RM估计为55 rad m$^{-2}$，大多数超新星遗迹区域的内部RM小于约50 rad m$^{-2}$。西南部视线方向的规则磁场估计约为1.4 $μ$G，远小于总磁场。在西南部和东北部的大部分区域，$p$小于8%，且随$λ^2$几乎保持不变。我们估计湍流磁场与规则磁场的比值大于约3。西北部某些区域的湍流磁场尺度可能小于约0.4 pc。尽管根据现有模型，东北部和西南部的演化差异很大，但它们的射电特性（包括频谱和湍流磁场）非常相似。这些结果应在未来的超新星遗迹演化建模中予以考虑。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：尽管东北和西南区域在当前模型下的演化差异很大，但它们的射电特性（包括频谱和湍流磁场）非常相似。这一发现需要在未来的超新星遗迹演化建模中加以考虑。
